name: macmic
tagline: Power for the Better - Professional Power Semiconductor Solutions
description: MacMic is a high-tech power semiconductor company specializing in IGBT modules, FRED chips, and power discrete devices. As an authorized MacMic distributor, BeiLuo provides comprehensive technical support and competitive pricing for industrial and new energy applications.
longDescription:
MacMic Science & Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech company founded by scientists and engineers with expertise in power electronics product development and manufacturing. MacMic emphasizes three essentials of business development: 'Independent Innovative Technology', 'World Class Power Semiconductor Development and Production', and 'High Efficiency and High Quality Production Management'.

The company is certified by ISO9001 Quality Assurance System and specializes in power electronic chips, discrete devices, and module design, development, production and marketing. MacMic's product portfolio includes Fast Recovery Epitaxial Diodes (FRED), VDMOS, IGBT chips, standard modules and custom power modules.

MacMic partners with leading companies to acquire advanced IGBT chip technology while also developing their own IGBT chips. Their IGBT modules feature the innovative 'HN' series enabling designs up to 50KHz in hard switching, and the cost-effective '6TC' series for motor drive applications. All MacMic IGBT modules adopt the latest Trench Field-Stop chip technology.

certifications.name: REACH Compliant
certifications.description: Registration, Evaluation, Authorization and Restriction of Chemicals

coreProducts.name: IGBT Modules
coreProducts.description: Trench Field-Stop IGBT modules including HN high-speed series and 6TC cost-effective series for motor drives, EVs, and industrial applications

coreProducts.name: FRED Chips & Modules
coreProducts.description: Fast Recovery Epitaxial Diode chips and modules with low switching losses and soft recovery characteristics

coreProducts.name: Power Discrete Devices
coreProducts.description: IGBT and FRED discrete devices in TO-220, TO-3P, and TO-247 packages for various power applications

coreProducts.name: MOSFET Modules
coreProducts.description: Low on-resistance MOSFET modules for high-power synchronous rectification applications

industries.name: Industrial Motor Drives
industries.description: Variable frequency drives, servo drives, and industrial automation systems

industries.name: New Energy Vehicles
industries.description: Electric vehicle powertrains, charging systems, and battery management

industries.name: Renewable Energy
industries.description: Solar inverters, wind power converters, and energy storage systems

industries.name: Welding & Induction Heating
industries.description: High-frequency welding machines and induction heating equipment

faqs.question: What are MacMic's main product categories?
faqs.answer: MacMic offers four core product categories: (1) IGBT Modules - Including HN high-speed series (up to 50KHz) and 6TC cost-effective series for motor drives and EVs; (2) FRED Chips & Modules - Fast Recovery Epitaxial Diodes with low switching losses; (3) Power Discrete Devices - IGBT and FRED in TO-220, TO-3P, TO-247 packages; (4) MOSFET Modules - Low on-resistance modules for synchronous rectification. All products feature Trench Field-Stop technology for optimal performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find detailed specifications and application guidance for your power electronics needs.

faqs.question: What makes MacMic IGBT modules different from competitors?
faqs.answer: MacMic IGBT modules feature several unique advantages: (1) HN Series - High-speed switching up to 50KHz with Vce(sat) around 2.0V, ideal for welding and induction heating; (2) 6TC Series - Cost-effective solution optimized for motor drives; (3) EV Series - Specialized for electric vehicle applications; (4) 3-Level Series - High-efficiency topology for advanced power conversion. All modules use latest Trench Field-Stop technology and offer excellent cost-performance ratio.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team to discuss which MacMic IGBT series is best suited for your specific application requirements.

faqs.question: Does MacMic offer customization services?
faqs.answer: Yes, MacMic specializes in custom power semiconductor solutions. They can develop custom products based on specific voltage, current, and package requirements at minimal or no extra cost. Customization options include: (1) Custom module configurations; (2) Special voltage/current ratings; (3) Unique package designs; (4) Application-specific optimizations. This flexibility makes MacMic an excellent choice for specialized industrial applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Submit your requirements to our technical team for a custom solution evaluation and quotation.
